policy.git_policy: Do not commit model/data/checkpoint artifacts. Commit only this metadata and replay script.
policy.download_policy: Download source-backed public artifacts when directly available. Mark incomplete/gated/non-equivalent sources as blocked with evidence.
policy.duplicate_weight_policy: Prefer safetensors over duplicate pytorch/tensorflow weights; download PyTorch weights when safetensors are unavailable.
